label: Full-Stack SaaS Architecture
text: Architected full-stack B2B SaaS platform across React, Flask, and AWS with end-to-end ownership; designed a microservice architecture with clear service boundaries across admin, dashboards, analytics, and user management domains with automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

label: High-Throughput Data & APIs
text: Designed fault-tolerant IoT ingestion pipeline processing 10M+ data points daily through RabbitMQ, machine learning-based normalization, fault detection, and database persistence; integrated VOLTTRON for message replay during network outages ensuring zero data loss; resolved intermittent data gaps via root cause analysis and implemented retry logic with exponential backoff.

label: LLM-Powered Support Chatbot
text: Designed agent-based RAG system using LangChain and LlamaIndex with FAISS vector search for semantic retrieval across building documentation; implemented conversation memory and context windowing for multi-turn interactions, achieving 85% response accuracy validated through SME testing.

label: Generative AI Data Labeling & ML Pipeline
text: Deployed OpenAI API-based machine learning workflow to normalize and classify unstructured IoT sensor data (e.g., TMP vs TEMP vendor variations) using NLP techniques and embedding-based similarity matching; eliminated a manual process while increasing labeling speed by 67% and maintaining 90% accuracy.

label: ML Model Development & Evaluation
text: Built and fine-tuned classification models using Scikit-learn and Python to detect HVAC fault patterns from time-series sensor data; designed feature engineering pipelines to extract meaningful signals from raw IoT streams, improving fault detection precision across 200+ commercial buildings.

label: Predictive Analytics & Energy Optimization
text: Developed machine learning models for predictive energy consumption analysis, leveraging historical sensor data and weather patterns to forecast building performance and support capital planning decisions that contributed to 25% energy cost savings.

label: Product & Stakeholder Alignment
text: Partnered with Product, UX, and Customer Success to translate evolving B2B requirements into technical specs and weekly feature releases; led architectural decision records (ADRs) for major infrastructure changes communicated across engineering and business stakeholders.

label: Centralized State Management Architecture
text: Designed centralized frontend state management system using React Context API and useReducer hooks, establishing unidirectional data flow patterns across 20+ components; eliminated prop drilling, reduced component coupling, and created clear separation between UI state and server state for a multi-tenant B2B dashboard serving 200+ buildings.

label: Container Orchestration (EKS/Kubernetes)
text: Deployed and managed containerized microservices on AWS EKS using Kubernetes; configured pod autoscaling, resource limits, and health probes to handle variable IoT data ingestion load; managed rolling deployments and service discovery across distributed backend services.

label: Testing Strategy & Quality Architecture
text: Established layered testing strategy across backend and frontend — unit tests for business logic, integration tests for API contracts, and end-to-end tests for critical user flows; made deliberate tradeoffs prioritizing integration test coverage over unit test volume given the data-intensive nature of IoT pipelines where real database behavior mattered more than mocked responses.

label: Hot/Cold Data Storage & Cost Optimization
text: Architected hot/cold storage pattern using RDS Aurora for 7-day active data and S3 for historical data, reducing infrastructure costs by 57%; built automated AWS Glue ETL pipelines for migration and Athena-backed APIs for historical analytics while maintaining sub-second query performance.

label: API Design & Database Architecture
text: Built 15+ RESTful APIs in Python/Flask and a GraphQL layer (Strawberry) that reduced API call volume by 60% via field-level optimization; implemented JWT + RBAC multi-tenant authentication, N+1 query prevention via DataLoader batching, connection pooling, and a fault detection service identifying HVAC anomalies from live sensor data. Designed 20+ table schema modeling complex many-to-many building/sensor/user relationships.

label: Rate Limiting & Observability
text: Designed token bucket rate limiting system with Redis across user tiers and endpoint sensitivity levels; built CloudWatch metrics and alerting stack tracking pipeline health, API latency, and data quality; reduced API response times by 65% through Redis caching and CDN strategies.

label: Real-Time Frontend & Component Architecture
text: Built 20+ reusable React/TypeScript/Material UI components reducing feature development time by 40%; implemented WebSocket integration for live sensor data updates with message batching and throttling to balance responsiveness with server load.

label: 3D Building Visualization System
text: Developed Three.js-based 3D building visualization with interactive HVAC sensor overlays and intelligent render caching to prevent redundant renders during navigation, enabling intuitive spatial understanding of complex building systems for non-technical end users.

label: Customer Impact & Business Outcomes
text: Platform serves 200+ commercial buildings; HVAC fault detection and AI-labeling pipeline directly contributed to 25% operational cost savings for customers; hot/cold storage redesign cut Joulea's own infrastructure costs by 57%.

label: Enterprise Application Development
text: Built and maintained a component-based Angular application for prepaid.t-mobile.com serving 20M+ prepaid customers; implemented lazy loading, tree shaking, and code splitting to cut initial load time by 40%; built PCI-compliant payment portal with secure transaction workflows.

label: Microservices & Payment Systems
text: Developed Java/Spring Boot microservices processing 5,000+ daily payment transactions at 99.9% uptime; designed REST and SOAP APIs bridging legacy mainframe billing to modern applications using adapter pattern for XML-to-JSON translation.

label: API Integration & Data Pipeline Design
text: Designed REST and SOAP APIs integrating legacy billing systems with modern payment applications, implementing data transformation pipelines following enterprise architecture and PCI-compliant standards.

label: Cloud-Native Infrastructure & Messaging
text: Deployed services via Docker and OpenShift with health checks, graceful shutdown, and rolling deployments for zero-downtime releases; integrated RabbitMQ for async payment processing with idempotent message handlers and dead letter queue retry logic; configured Apigee for rate limiting and traffic management across services.

label: Technical Documentation & Training
text: Authored significant technical documentation and conducted 20+ knowledge transfer sessions, reducing onboarding time by 30%.

label: Monitoring & Incident Response
text: Led 40+ critical system responses and implemented Splunk monitoring dashboards with automated alerting, improving mean resolution time and maintaining cross-team stakeholder communication during incidents.

label: Test Automation
text: Developed Java and Selenium automated test cases for event management workflows, reducing manual testing effort and boosting the test suite coverage.

label: Business Impact Development
text: Contributed to Lead Scoring algorithm using Java/SQL, reducing hoteliers' response time on event inquiries by over 90%.
